dict.string: SAM needs access to your Calendar to track meetings and interactions with your clients, and to help you with time management. SAM will only use the calendar you specify.

SAM needs access to your Contacts to import and manage client relationships. SAM reads all contacts to help identify matches and avoid duplicates, but only imports and updates contacts in the group you choose.
SAM needs to read your Mail to track email interactions with your clients. SAM only stores summaries — never raw email content.
SAM uses on-device speech recognition to transcribe voice notes during meetings. Audio is processed locally and never sent to external servers.
SAM needs microphone access to record voice notes during meetings. Audio is processed on-device for transcription only.
SAM receives audio from SAM Field on your iPhone over your local network for transcription. All audio stays on your local network and is never sent to external servers.
